overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a historic Southern residential district. The character exits a private garden onto a cobblestone street where a horse-drawn carriage passes by, then turns into another residential garden featuring a wooden pergola.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a brick path through a garden toward an iron gate

entered.detail: large oak tree with Spanish moss hanging from branches
tall brick boundary wall with stone coping
multi-story Victorian house with ornate roof and bay windows
black cast iron street lamp with glass enclosure
wrought iron entrance gate with stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a private garden with a large oak tree and brick pathways. The garden is enclosed by a brick wall on the left, with a Victorian mansion visible in the distance. The character approaches a wrought iron gate at the end of the path.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the field of view
exits the garden through the iron gate onto the cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: exiting the garden and walking along the cobblestone street sidewalk, observing the passing carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white horse moving along the street from right to left

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road surface with visible wheel ruts
covered wagon pulled by a white horse with a driver
two-story wooden house with front porch and black shutters
tall wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character exits the garden onto a cobblestone residential street. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, moving along the wet cobblestones. The character walks along the sidewalk past Victorian houses with wooden facades and telegraph poles lining the street.

events.description: turns left off the street into a private garden entrance

agents.ego_description: turning into a side garden and walking along the house toward a pergola-covered patio area

entered.detail: white clapboard house with black shutters and brick foundation
white painted metal garden bench with ornate design
wooden pergola with climbing vines and support posts
white metal table and chairs on a circular brick patio
tall wooden privacy fence separating properties

segments.scene_description: The character turns off the street into a private side garden with dense vegetation and a white wooden house on the left. The path leads to a wooden pergola covering an outdoor dining area with white furniture. The garden features raised planters, potted plants, and a wooden fence on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded private estate through a bustling residential street and into a lush side garden. It begins by following a character along brick pathways beneath a large oak tree, moving past a brick wall toward a wrought iron gate with a Victorian mansion looming in the distance. As the character exits the gate, the environment opens onto a wet cobblestone street where a horse-drawn carriage passes by amidst a row of wooden Victorian houses and telegraph poles. The scene then shifts as the character turns off the main road, transitioning from the open street into a dense private garden featuring a white wooden house. Finally, the path leads under a wooden pergola covering an outdoor dining area with white furniture, surrounded by raised planters and a wooden fence.
